message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #EEEEEE
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam lifelineStrategy nosolid
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 1
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ParticipantPadding 10
  ParticipantMargin 10
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
  NoteBorderColor #000000
  NoteFontColor #000000
}

title DIFA Authentication and Authorization Flow

participant "Bruker" as User
participant "Kjedesystem" as ChainSystem
participant "Identity Provider" as IdP
participant "DifaGUI" as DifaGUI
participant "Tilgangskontroll" as AccessControl
database "HPR-DB" as HPRDB
participant "HDIR" as HDIR

== Initial Setup ==
HDIR -> HPRDB: Oppdatert helsepersonellregister

== User Interaction ==
User -> ChainSystem: Velg DIFA operasjon fra meny
ChainSystem --> User: Redirect
User -> DifaGUI: Utfør operasjon
DifaGUI --> User: Krever pålogging - redirect
User -> IdP: Logg på
IdP --> User: Access token
User -> DifaGUI: Access token

== Authorization Process ==
activate DifaGUI
DifaGUI -> AccessControl: Autoriser bruker
activate AccessControl
AccessControl -> IdP: Access token
IdP --> AccessControl: JWT
note right of IdP: token er en signert JSON payload
AccessControl -> IdP: «cached» Hent kjedesertifikat
AccessControl -> AccessControl: Verifiser token signatur
AccessControl -> AccessControl: Hent HPR nr fra token (+ roller)
AccessControl -> HPRDB: HPR nummer
HPRDB --> AccessControl: Autorisasjon (eks "farmasøyt")
AccessControl -> AccessControl: Avgjør tilgang
deactivate AccessControl
AccessControl --> DifaGUI: 
DifaGUI -> DifaGUI: utfør operasjon
deactivate DifaGUI
DifaGUI --> User: 

@enduml
